markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's lead qualification needs and explore Attio's capabilities for customer success management.](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX plans to implement Default for lead qualification and routing, with a webhook to Attio](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Attio's workspace object can be utilized for comprehensive customer success management](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Attio offers flexibility in creating custom views (e.g., lists, Kanban) for project/customer tracking](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Attio is open to providing discounted rates for additional "lite" user seats in the future](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)

## Topics

### Lead Qualification and Routing Solution

  - [GrowthX currently bottlenecked by unqualified leads reaching the founder](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Exploring options: Chili Piper, RevenueHero, Default](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Default emerged as preferred choice due to features and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Attio integration possible via webhook or Zapier, negating need for native integration](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)

### Attio for Customer Success Management

  - [Workspace object represents customer accounts, storing key information](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [User object distinct from contacts, represents product users](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [Lists used for various purposes: onboarding, renewals, account health monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [Sequences tool available for email campaigns, integrated with workflows](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [Activity feed shows product usage updates, list changes](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Attio Customization and Flexibility

  - [Custom objects can be created (e.g., for projects)](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Lists can be used to create Kanban views for project/customer tracking](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Tasks can be associated with workspaces or companies, depending on team process](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)

### User Management in Attio

  - [Currently no "lite" user option, but Attio open to providing discounted rates](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)
  - [GrowthX considering adding \~10 additional users in the future](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to implement Default for lead qualification and integrate with Attio](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Explore and set up Attio's workspace object for customer success management](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Consider creating custom lists and views for project/customer tracking](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Follow up with Attio when ready to add more users for potential discounted rates](https://fathom.video/share/N3aqKGsadFVJhJsWiHYJTeMPBCf39zSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)
